sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116499" key="w)xrosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠχροσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n116499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pallor,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.Astr.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
